title: ux-ListBox
text: ux-ListBox This section provides description for the logical UX widget ux-ListBox properties. ux-ListBox widget Table 1. Widget Summary Property Description Default definition: ux-ListBox=() Logical widget name: ux-ListBox Maps to physical widget: uxlistbox of type boolean Supported triggers: onchange Use for: String fields with ValRep list Related Links uxlistbox The uxlistbox widget is a control element that displays a list of items and allows the user to select a single option from a short list. You can use uxlistbox in data-entry constructions next to a radiogroup and/or a textfield. UX Widgets Uniface UX provides a set of widgets that are implemented using the UX Widget Interface. This set is referred as UX Widgets. The sources of these widgets are available and allow changes and/or extensions to the widgets. In a default Uniface installation, you can find the sources in the <install>\uniface\webapps\uniface\common\ux folder. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
